name: Turkey Mexican
recipeInstructions: Cut the turkey into eight 3-inch slices. Place the turkey in a large skillet, overlapping slices. Add the salsa. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes. Add the cheese and olives. Cover and heat for one more minute until the cheese melts. Place the turkey on a serving platter. Garnish with sour cream and parsley. Makes 4 servings.
